creator: regisr@pobox.com
text:
GET, HEAD and POST don't exists in the last release but are described in the man page

Fix: 

Create links:
 ln -s  /usr/local/bin/lwp-request  /usr/local/bin/HEAD
 ln -s  /usr/local/bin/lwp-request  /usr/local/bin/GET
 ln -s  /usr/local/bin/lwp-request  /usr/local/bin/POST
